name: TextHome
summary: Text-based simple home launcher app, supports widgets, background images, clock, weather, battery, text widgets.
description: A minimalist launcher app designed for Rokid Glasses. Stripping away the complexity of the default system UI, it focuses on providing the fastest access to your most-used apps. You can add widgets to the home screen with basic touch. Built on the principle of "Use with touch, set with mouse."

listing.descriptionMarkdown:
A **minimalist launcher app** designed for Rokid Glasses.
Stripping away the complexity of the default system UI, it focuses on providing the fastest access to your most-used apps. You can add widgets to the home screen with basic touch. Built on the principle of **"Use with touch, set with mouse."**

### Usage / Controls

- **Favorites:** Recently used apps are automatically added to favorites.
- **Setup Mode:** Connect a Bluetooth mouse to detailedly edit favorites and widgets.
- **Widget Management:** Drag widgets to adjust their positions.

releases.notes: Added Translator, Prompter, and Navigation menus to the APPS menu.

Add double tap to close sub menu, add background image setting function: You can set the background image. After connecting the Rokid Glasses in the web install menu, you can upload the image with the TextHome background image upload button. The size of the background image is 398 x 480 in jpg format.

author: EUNG SOFT
